---
title: "Commentary"
description: "Op-eds, analysis, and media commentary on Chinese foreign policy, US-China relations, and East Asian affairs."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section .media-section}
::: {.container}
## Commentary {.section-title}

::: {.media-featured}
::: {.featured-media}
[OP-ED]{.media-type .op-ed}

### "China's Grand Reception for Kim Jong Un: Strategic Reset or Warning Shot?"

38 North, Stimson Center

[*September 5, 2025*]{.media-date}
:::
:::

::: {.media-grid}

::: {.media-item}
[OP-ED]{.media-type .op-ed}

#### "Confucius Says: Get the Definition of US-China 'Competition' Right"

[Responsible Statecraft]{.outlet} · November 4, 2024
:::

::: {.media-item}
[ANALYSIS]{.media-type .analysis}

#### "Is China Being Played by North Korea and Russia?"

[Responsible Statecraft]{.outlet} · November 25, 2024
:::

::: {.media-item}
[COMMENTARY]{.media-type .commentary}

#### "Sino-Indian Double Rivalry in the Shadow of Trump's Return"

[China-India Brief]{.outlet} · December 23, 2024
:::

::: {.media-item}
[PODCAST]{.media-type .podcast}

#### "China-North Korea Evolving Relations"

[China Power Podcast, Center for Strategic & International Studies]{.outlet} · December 19, 2024
:::

:::

::: {.media-outlets}
#### Commentary Outlets

::: {.outlets-list}
[Foreign Affairs]{.outlet-tag}
[Foreign Policy]{.outlet-tag}
[Responsible Statecraft]{.outlet-tag}
[East Asian Forum]{.outlet-tag}
[Wire China]{.outlet-tag}
[National Interest]{.outlet-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.media-cta}
[View All Commentary](assets/Feng_Zhang_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::
:::
